hostMonitoring.invalidation: The active producer receives SIGTERM and its sole attempt is rejected after any failed periodic sample.
hostMonitoring.policy: Full pinned-host/runtime attestation before and after each producer; lightweight overlap, AC-power, and thermal-pressure checks every 30 seconds while it is alive.
hostMonitoring.signalHandling: SIGINT or SIGTERM terminates the active producer process group, escalates to SIGKILL after 10 seconds if needed, and records an adjacent rejected completion.

sourceDependencyPreflight.executionBoundary: Must pass after the committed frozen prelude and before output-root creation, log creation, attempt-ID allocation, ledger attempt-start, or producer spawn.
